case_title: KATIE HUNT VS. ETHAN RUAN ET AL

REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: ORDER RECALLING WRIT OF EXECUTION MAILED TO KELLY DARNELL ON 10/11/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF :FEE FOR SERVICE $61.00 SERVED FEB-17-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DARNELL, KELLY

REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $3,030.31 RE 34942 FOR TRANSACTION W0517A10D006 (DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT), PAYABLE TO KATIE HUNT, DOC #1908671554, WARRANT #38205081, DATED NOV-08-2017
TRIAL RESET TO MAR-07-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF FEB-08-2017 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-07-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-07-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF KATIE HUNT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ETHAN RUAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KELLY DARNELL IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE AS TO KELLY DARNELL. PLAINTIFF DISMISSES WITHOUT PREJUDICE THE CLAIM AGAINST KELLY DARNELL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RECALLING WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT RUAN, ETHAN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,250.00 FILED BY HUNT, KATIE AS TO DEFENDANT RUAN, ETHAN DARNELL, KELLY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-08-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-07-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUNT, KATIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RUAN, ETHAN $2,750.00 PRINCIPAL, $111.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,861.00, AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, PLAINTIFFS CLAIM AGAINST KELLY DARNELL IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS NO PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR BY DEFENDANT RUAN, ETHAN
